description: This file controls all skill functionalities. Skills are abilities used by all units in the game. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: skill
columns.description: Defines the unique name ID for the skill, which is how other files can reference the skill. The order of the defined skills will determine their ID numbers, so they should not be reordered.

columns.name: charclass
columns.description: Assigns the skill to a specific character class which affects how skill item modifiers work and what skills the class can learn.

columns.name: skilldesc
columns.description: Pointer to data that controls the skill's tooltip and general UI display.

columns.name: srvstfunc
columns.description: Server Start function. This controls how the skill works when it is starting to cast, on the server side. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: srvdofunc
columns.description: Server Do function. This controls how the skill works when it finishes being cast, on the server side. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: srvstopfunc
columns.description: Server Stop function. This controls how the skill cleans up after ending. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: prgstack
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then all .srvprgfunc# functions will execute, based on the current number of progressive charges. If equals 0, then only the relative .srvprgfunc# function will execute, based on the current number of progressive charges.

columns.name: srvprgfunc1
columns.description: Controls what Server Do function is used when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. This field uses the same functions as the .srvdofunc field.

columns.name: srvprgfunc2
columns.description: Controls what Server Do function is used when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. This field uses the same functions as the .srvdofunc field.

columns.name: srvprgfunc3
columns.description: Controls what Server Do function is used when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. This field uses the same functions as the .srvdofunc field.

columns.name: prgcalc1
columns.description: Calculation Field. Used as a possible parameter for calculating values when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: prgcalc2
columns.description: Calculation Field. Used as a possible parameter for calculating values when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: prgcalc3
columns.description: Calculation Field. Used as a possible parameter for calculating values when executing the progressive skill with a charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: prgdam
columns.description: Calls a function to modify the progressive damage dealt

columns.name: srvmissile
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the main missile used by the server functions.

columns.name: decquant
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the unit's ammo quantity will be updated each time the skill's .srvdofunc is called. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: lob
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then missiles created by the skill's functions will use the missile lobbing function, which will cause the missile fly in an arc pattern. If equals 0, then missiles that are created will use the normal linear function.

columns.name: srvmissilea
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the server functions.

columns.name: srvmissileb
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the server functions.

columns.name: srvmissilec
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the server functions.

columns.name: useServerMissilesOnRemoteClients
columns.description: Control new missile changes per player skill. Values of 1 will force enable it for that skill. Skills that have matching server/client missiles sets for the skill get auto enabled. Setting this to a value greater than 1 will force it to skip this auto enable logic. If equals 0, then ignore this. Note: this feature is disabled.

columns.name: srvoverlay
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions to create an overlay on units.

columns.name: aurafilter
columns.description: Controls different flags that affect how the skill's aura will affect the different types of units. Uses an integer value to check against different bit fields. For example, if the value equals 4354 (binary = 1000100000010) then that returns true for the 4096 (binary = 1000000000000), 256 (binary = 0000100000000), and 2 (binary = 0000000000010) bit field values.

columns.name: aurastate
columns.description: A state applied to the caster unit. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auratargetstate
columns.description: A state applied to the target unit. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auralencalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the state duration on the unit (where 25 Frames = 1 second). If this value is empty, then the state duration will be controlled by other functions, or it will last forever. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurarangecalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the area radius size for auras and other effects, measured in grid sub-tiles. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat1
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc1
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat2
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc2
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat3
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc3
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat4
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc4
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat5
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc5
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aurastat6
columns.description: Controls which stat modifiers will be altered or added by the skill. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: aurastatcalc6
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .aurastat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: auraevent1
columns.description: Controls what event will trigger the relative .auraeventfunc# field function. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auraeventfunc1
columns.description: Controls the function used when the relative .auraevent# event is triggered. Corresponds to a enums.Server Event Functions.

columns.name: auraevent2
columns.description: Controls what event will trigger the relative .auraeventfunc# field function. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auraeventfunc2
columns.description: Controls the function used when the relative .auraevent# event is triggered. Corresponds to a enums.Server Event Functions.

columns.name: auraevent3
columns.description: Controls what event will trigger the relative .auraeventfunc# field function. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auraeventfunc3
columns.description: Controls the function used when the relative .auraevent# event is triggered. Corresponds to a enums.Server Event Functions.

columns.name: auraevent4
columns.description: Controls what event will trigger the relative .auraeventfunc# field function. Used as a possible parameter used by various skill functions.

columns.name: auraeventfunc4
columns.description: Controls the function used when the relative .auraevent# event is triggered. Corresponds to a enums.Server Event Functions.

columns.name: passivestate
columns.description: Links to a state that is automatically applied as a passive when the skill gains levels.

columns.name: passiveitype
columns.description: Links to an Item Type to define what type of item needs to be equipped in order to enable the .passivestate. Not all stats support this behavior, usually only ones with "mastery" in the name.

columns.name: passivereqweaponcount
columns.description: Controls how many equipped weapons are needed for the .passivestate to be enabled. If the value equals 1, then the player must have 1 weapon equipped for the .passivestate to be enabled. If the value equals 2, then the player must be dual wielding weapons for the .passivestate to be enabled. If the value equals 0, then ignore this field. Not all stats support this behavior, usually only ones with "mastery" in the name.

columns.name: passivestat1
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc1
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat2
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc2
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat3
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc3
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat4
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc4
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat5
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc5
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat6
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc6
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat7
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc7
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat8
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc8
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat9
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc9
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat10
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc10
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat11
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc11
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat12
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc12
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat13
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc13
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: passivestat14
columns.description: Assigns stat modifiers to the .passivestate.

columns.name: passivecalc14
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the value for the relative .passivestat# field. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: summon
columns.description: Controls what monster is summoned by the skill. This field's usage will depend on the skill function used. This field can also be used as reference for AI behaviors and for the skilldesc file.

columns.name: pettype
columns.description: Links to a pet type data to control how the summoned unit is displayed on the UI

columns.name: petmax
columns.description: Calculation Field. Used skill functions that summon pets to control how many summon units are allowed at a time. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: requirespettype
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill requires at least one pet of the pettype to cast.

columns.name: summode
columns.description: Defines the animation mode that the summoned monster will be initiated with. Uses a MonMode.code.

columns.name: sumskill1
columns.description: Assigns a skill to the summoned monster. This can be useful for adding a skill to a monster to transition its synergy bonuses.

columns.name: sumsk1calc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the skill level for the designated .sumskill# field when the skill is assigned to the monster. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumskill2
columns.description: Assigns a skill to the summoned monster. This can be useful for adding a skill to a monster to transition its synergy bonuses.

columns.name: sumsk2calc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the skill level for the designated .sumskill# field when the skill is assigned to the monster. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumskill3
columns.description: Assigns a skill to the summoned monster. This can be useful for adding a skill to a monster to transition its synergy bonuses.

columns.name: sumsk3calc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the skill level for the designated .sumskill# field when the skill is assigned to the monster. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumskill4
columns.description: Assigns a skill to the summoned monster. This can be useful for adding a skill to a monster to transition its synergy bonuses.

columns.name: sumsk4calc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the skill level for the designated .sumskill# field when the skill is assigned to the monster. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumskill5
columns.description: Assigns a skill to the summoned monster. This can be useful for adding a skill to a monster to transition its synergy bonuses.

columns.name: sumsk5calc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the skill level for the designated .sumskill# field when the skill is assigned to the monster. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumumod
columns.description: Assigns a monster modifier to the summoned monster. Uses the index of an entry in monumod Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: sumoverlay
columns.description: Creates an overlay on the summoned monster when it is first created.

columns.name: stsuccessonly
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the following sound and overlay fields will only play when the skill is successfully cast, instead of always being used even when the skill cast is interrupted. If equals 0, then the following sound and overlay fields will always be used when the skill is cast, regardless if the skill was interrupted or not.

columns.name: stsound
columns.description: Controls what client sound is played when the skill is used, based on the client starting function

columns.name: stsoundclass
columns.description: Controls what client sound is played when the skill is used by the skill's assigned class (See .charclass field), based on the client starting function. If the unit using the skill is not the same class as the .charclass value for the skill, then this sound will not play.

columns.name: stsounddelay
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then use the weapon's hit class to determine the delay in frames (where 25 frames = 1 second) before playing the skill's start sound. If equals 0, then the skill's start sound will play immediately.

columns.name: weaponsnd
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then play the weapon's hit sound when hitting an enemy with this skill. The sound chosen is based on the weapon's hit class. Also use the sound delay based on the weapon's hit class to determine the delay in frames (where 25 frames = 1 second) before playing the weapon hit sound (See .stsounddelay for the types of hit class sounds and delays used). If equals 0, then do not play the weapon hit sound when hitting an enemy with the skill attack.

columns.name: dosound
columns.description: Controls the sound for the skill each time the .cltdofunc is used

columns.name: dosound a
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for playing additional sounds based on the .cltdofunc used

columns.name: dosound b
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for playing additional sounds based on the .cltdofunc used

columns.name: tgtoverlay
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for adding an Overlay on the target unit, based on the .cltdofunc used

columns.name: tgtsound
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for playing a sound located on the target unit, based on the .cltdofunc used

columns.name: prgoverlay
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for adding an Overlay on the caster unit for progressive charge-up skill functions, based on the .cltdofunc used and how many progressive charges the caster unit has

columns.name: prgsound
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for playing a sound when using the skill for progressive charge-up skill functions, based on the .cltdofunc used and how many progressive charges the caster unit has

columns.name: castoverlay
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for adding an Overlay on the caster unit when using the skill, based on the .cltstfunc / .cltdofunc used

columns.name: cltoverlaya
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for adding additional Overlays on the caster unit, based on the .cltstfunc / .cltdofunc used

columns.name: cltoverlayb
columns.description: Used as a possible parameter for adding additional Overlays on the caster unit, based on the .cltstfunc / .cltdofunc used

columns.name: cltstfunc
columns.description: Client Start function. This controls how the skill works when it is starting to cast, on the client side. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: cltdofunc
columns.description: Client Do function. This controls how the skill works when it finishes being cast, on the client side. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: cltstopfunc
columns.description: Client Stop function. This controls how the skill cleans up after ending. This uses a code value to call a function, affecting how certain fields are used.

columns.name: cltprgfunc1
columns.description: Controls which Client Do function is used when the skill is executed while having a progressive charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. (uses .cltdofunc values)

columns.name: cltprgfunc2
columns.description: Controls which Client Do function is used when the skill is executed while having a progressive charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. (uses .cltdofunc values)

columns.name: cltprgfunc3
columns.description: Controls which Client Do function is used when the skill is executed while having a progressive charge number equal to 1, 2, and 3, respectively. (uses .cltdofunc values)

columns.name: cltmissile
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the main missile by the client functions.

columns.name: cltmissilea
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the client functions.

columns.name: cltmissileb
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the client functions.

columns.name: cltmissilec
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the client functions.

columns.name: cltmissiled
columns.description: Used as a parameter for controlling the secondary missiles used by the client functions.

columns.name: cltcalc1
columns.description: Calculation Field. Use as a possible parameter for controlling values for the client functions. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: cltcalc2
columns.description: Calculation Field. Use as a possible parameter for controlling values for the client functions. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: cltcalc3
columns.description: Calculation Field. Use as a possible parameter for controlling values for the client functions. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: warp
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and the skill uses a function that involves warping/teleporting, then check for a scene transition loading screen, if necessary. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: immediate
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and the skill has a periodic function, then immediately perform the skill's function when the periodic skill is activated. If equals 0, then wait until the skill's first periodic delay before performing the skill's function.

columns.name: enhanceable
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will be included in the plus to all skills item modifier. If equals 0, then the skill will not be included in the plus to all skills item modifier.

columns.name: attackrank
columns.description: Controls the skill's AI score value for determining what is the best target for the AI. The higher the value, then the more likely the AI will select a target with this skill equipped.

columns.name: noammo
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will not check that weapon's ammo when performing an attack. This relies on the itemtypes.Shoots field. If equals 0, then the weapon will consume its ammo when being used by the skill.

columns.name: range
columns.description: Determines how the unit uses the skill, which affects the weapon requirements and the type of attack used.

columns.name: weapsel
columns.description: If the unit can dual wield weapons, then this field will control how the weapons are used for the skill

columns.name: requiresweapon
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill requires an equiped weapon to cast.

columns.name: itypea1
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used

columns.name: itypea2
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used

columns.name: itypea3
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used

columns.name: etypea1
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are excluded, or not allowed, when determining if this skill can be used

columns.name: etypea2
columns.description: Controls what Item Types are excluded, or not allowed, when determining if this skill can be used

columns.name: itypeb1
columns.description: Controls what alternate Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used. This acts as a second set of Item Types to check.

columns.name: itypeb2
columns.description: Controls what alternate Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used. This acts as a second set of Item Types to check.

columns.name: itypeb3
columns.description: Controls what alternate Item Types are included, or allowed, when determining if this skill can be used. This acts as a second set of Item Types to check.

columns.name: etypeb1
columns.description: Controls what alternate Item Types are excluded, or not allowed, when determining if this skill can be used. This acts as a second set of Item Types to check.

columns.name: etypeb2
columns.description: Controls what alternate Item Types are excluded, or not allowed, when determining if this skill can be used. This acts as a second set of Item Types to check.

columns.name: anim
columns.description: Controls the animation mode that the player character will use when using this skill. Setting the mode to Sequence (SQ) will cause the player character to play a time controlled animation sequence, utilizing certain sequence fields. Uses a PlrMode.Code

columns.name: seqtrans
columns.description: If the .anim field equals SQ (Sequence) and this field equals SC (Cast), then the sequence animation speed can be modified by the faster cast rate stat modifier. Uses a PlrMode.Code

columns.name: monanim
columns.description: Controls the animation mode that the monster will use when using this skill. This is similar to the .anim field except with monster units using the skill instead of player units. Uses a MonMode.code

columns.name: seqnum
columns.description: If the unit is a player and the .anim used for the skill is a Sequence, then this field will control the index of which sequence animation to use. These sequences are specifically designed for certain skills, and each sequence has a set number of frames using certain animations.

columns.name: seqinput
columns.description: For skills that can repeat, this controls the number of frames to wait before the "Do" frame in the sequence. This acts as a delay in frames (25 Frames = 1 second) to wait within the sequence animation before it is allowed to be cast again or for looping back to the start of the sequence, such as for the Sorceress Inferno skill.

columns.name: durability
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and when the player character ends an animation mode that was not Attack 1, Attack 2, or Throw, then check the quantity and durability of the player's items to see if the valid weapons are out of ammo or are broken. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: UseAttackRate
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the current attack speed should be updated after using the skill, relative to the "attackrate" stat (See itemstatcost), and if the skill was an attacking skill. If equals 0, then the attack speed will not be updated after using the skill.

columns.name: LineOfSight
columns.description: Controls the skill's collision filters for valid target locations when it is being cast

columns.name: TargetableOnly
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will require a target unit in order to be used. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: SearchEnemyXY
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then when the skill is cast on a target location, it will automatically search in different directions in the target area to find the first available enemy target. If equals 0, then ignore this. This field can be overridden if the .SearchEnemyNear field is enabled.

columns.name: SearchEnemyNear
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then when the skill is cast on a target location, it will automatically find the nearest enemy target. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: SearchOpenXY
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then automatically search in a radius of size 7 in around the clicked target location to find an available unoccupied location to use the skill, testing for collision. If equals 0, then ignore this. This field can be overridden if the .SearchEnemyNear or .SearchEnemyXY field is enabled.

columns.name: SelectProc
columns.description: Uses a function to check that the target is a corpse with various parameters before validating the usage of the skill

columns.name: TargetCorpse
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill is allowed to target corpses. If equals 0, then skill cannot target corpses.

columns.name: TargetPet
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill is allowed to target pets (summons and mercenaries). If equals 0, then the skill cannot target pets.

columns.name: TargetAlly
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill is allowed to target ally units. If equals 0, then the skill cannot target ally units.

columns.name: TargetItem
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill is allowed to target items on the ground. If equals 0, then the skill cannot target items.

columns.name: AttackNoMana
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then then when the caster does not have enough mana to cast the skill and attempts to use the skill, the caster will default to using the Attack skill. If equals 0, then attempting to use the skill without enough mana will do nothing.

columns.name: TgtPlaceCheck
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then check that the target location is available for spawning a unit, testing collision. If equals 0, then ignore this. This is only used for skills that monsters use to spawn new units.

columns.name: KeepCursorStateOnKill
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the mouse click hold state will continue to stay active after killing a selected target. If equals 0, then after killing the target, the mouse click hold state will reset.

columns.name: ContinueCastUnselected
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then while the mouse is held down and there is no more target selected, then the skill will continue being used at the mouse's location. If equals 0, then while the mouse is held down and there is no more target selected, then the player character will cancel the skill and move to the mouse location.

columns.name: ClearSelectedOnHold
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then when the mouse is held down, the target selection will be cleared. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: ItemEffect
columns.description: Uses a Server Do function (See .srvdofunc) for handling how the skill is used when it is triggered by an item, on the server side.

columns.name: ItemCltEffect
columns.description: Uses a Client Do function (See .cltdofunc) for handling how the skill is used when it is triggered by an item, on the client side.

columns.name: ItemTgtDo
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then use the skill from the enemy target instead of the caster. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: ItemTarget
columns.description: Controls the targeting behavior of the skill when it is triggered by an item.

columns.name: ItemUseRestrict
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then use the state restriction defined in the .restrict field when being triggered by an item.

columns.name: ItemCheckStart
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then use the skill's Server Start function (See .srvstfunc) when the skill is trigged by an item. If equals 0, then the skill's Server Start function is ignored.

columns.name: ItemCltCheckStart
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then when the skill is triggered by an item, and if the target is dead and the skill has a Client Start function (See .cltstfunc), then add the "corpse_noselect" flag to the target. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: ItemCastSound
columns.description: Play a sound when the skill is used by an item event.

columns.name: ItemCastOverlay
columns.description: Add a cast overlay when the skill is used by an item event.

columns.name: skpoints
columns.description: Controls the number of Skill Points needed to level up the skill Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: reqlevel
columns.description: Minimum character level required to be allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill. For Reign of the Warlock mode games, also use this to calculate an item's staff mods, using the following level tiers: {1, 6, 12, 18, 24, 30}.

columns.name: maxlvl
columns.description: Maximum base level for the skill from spending Skill Points. Skill levels can be increased beyond this through item modifiers.

columns.name: reqstr
columns.description: Minimum Strength attribute required to be allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill

columns.name: reqdex
columns.description: Minimum Dexterity attribute required to be allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill

columns.name: reqint
columns.description: Minimum Intelligence attribute required to be allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill

columns.name: reqvit
columns.description: Minimum Vitality attribute required to be allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill

columns.name: reqskill1
columns.description: Points to a .skill field to act as a prerequisite skill. The prerequisite skill must be least base level 1 before the player is allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill.

columns.name: reqskill2
columns.description: Points to a .skill field to act as a prerequisite skill. The prerequisite skill must be least base level 1 before the player is allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill.

columns.name: reqskill3
columns.description: Points to a .skill field to act as a prerequisite skill. The prerequisite skill must be least base level 1 before the player is allowed to spend Skill Points on this skill.

columns.name: restrict
columns.description: Controls how the skill is used when the unit has a restricted state (See the states.restrict field)

columns.name: State1
columns.description: Used as parameters for the .restrict field to control what specific states will restrict the usage of the skill.

columns.name: State2
columns.description: Used as parameters for the .restrict field to control what specific states will restrict the usage of the skill.

columns.name: State3
columns.description: Used as parameters for the .restrict field to control what specific states will restrict the usage of the skill.

columns.name: localdelay
columns.description: Controls the Casting Delay duration for this skill after it is used (25 frames = 1 second) Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: globaldelay
columns.description: Controls the Casting Delay duration for all other skills with Casting Delays after this skill is used (25 frames = 1 second) Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: leftskill
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will appear on the list of skills to assign for the Left Mouse Button. If equals 0, then the skill will not appear on the Left Mouse Button skill list.

columns.name: rightskill
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will appear on the list of skills to assign for the Right Mouse Button. If equals 0, then the skill will not appear on the Right Mouse Button skill list.

columns.name: repeat
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1 and the skill has no .anim mode declared, then on the client side, the unit's mode will repeat its current mode (this can also happen if the unit has the "inferno" state). If equals 0, then the unit will have its mode set to Neutral when starting to use the skill. Also is used to mark the skill as repeatable in some AIs, like the generic pet ai.

columns.name: alwayshit
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then skills that rely on attack rating and defense will ignore those stats and will always hit enemies. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: usemanaondo
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will consume mana on its do function instead of its start function. If equals 0, then the skill will consume mana on its start function, which is the general case for skills.

columns.name: startmana
columns.description: Controls the required amount of mana to start using the skill. This only works with certain .srvstfunc functions such as .srv-SorStartInferno (Code = 11) or .srv-AssStartBladeFury (Code = 26).

columns.name: minmana
columns.description: Controls the minimum amount of mana to use the skill. This can control skills that reduce in mana cost per level to not fall below this amount.

columns.name: manashift
columns.description: This acts as a multiplicative modifier to control the precision of the mana cost after calculating the total mana cost with the .mana and .lvlmana. Mana is calculated in 256ths in code which equals 8 bits. This field acts as a bitwise shift value, which means it will modify the mana value by the power of 2. For example, if this value equals 5 then that means divide the mana value of 256ths by 2^5 = 32 (or multiply the mana by 32/256). A value equal to 8 means 256/256 which means that the mana of 256ths value is not shifted.

columns.name: mana
columns.description: Defines the base mana cost to use the skill at level 1

columns.name: lvlmana
columns.description: Defines the change in mana cost per skill level gained

columns.name: interrupt
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the casting the skill will be interruptible such as when the player is getting hit while casting a skill. If equals 0, then the skill should be uninterruptible.

columns.name: InTown
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill can be used while the unit is in town. If equals 0, then the skill cannot be used in town.

columns.name: aura
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will be classified as an aura, which will make the skill execute its function periodically (using the .perdelay field), based on the if the .aurastate state is active. Aura skills will also override a preexisting state if that state matches the skill's .aurastate state. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: periodic
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will execute its function periodically (using the .perdelay field), based on the if the .aurastate state is active. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: perdelay
columns.description: Calculation Field. Controls the periodic rate that the skill continuously executes its function. Minimum value equals 5. This field requires .periodic or .aura field to be enabled. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: periodicClearAura
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then upon removal of the registered periodic event, the associated .aurastate will be cleared.

columns.name: finishing
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will be classified as a finishing move, which can affect how progressive charges are consumed when using the skill and how the skill's description tooltip is displayed. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: prgchargestocast
columns.description: Controls how many progressive charges are required to cast the skill

columns.name: prgchargesconsumed
columns.description: Controls how many progressive charges are consumed when the skill attack hits an enemy

columns.name: passive
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will be treated as a passive, which can mean that the skill will not show up in the skill selection menu and will not run a server do function. If equals 0, then the skill is an active skill that can be used.

columns.name: progressive
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill will use the progressive calculations to act as a charge-up skill that will add charges. This is only used for certain skill functions and will generally require the usage of the .prgcalc# fields and the .aurastat# fields. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: scroll
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill can appear as a scroll version in the skill selection UI, if the skill allows for the scroll mechanics and if the player has the skill's scroll item in the inventory. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: calc1
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc2
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc3
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc4
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc5
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc6
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc7
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc8
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc9
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: calc10
columns.description: Calculation Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: Param1
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param2
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param3
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param4
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param5
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param6
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param7
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param8
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param9
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param10
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param11
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param12
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param13
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param14
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param15
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param16
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param17
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param18
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param19
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: Param20
columns.description: Integer Field. It is used as a possible parameter for skill functions or as a numeric input for other calculation fields.

columns.name: InGame
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then the skill is enabled to be used in-game. If equals 0, then the skill will be disabled in-game.

columns.name: ToHit
columns.description: Baseline bonus Attack Rating that is added to the attack when using this skill at level 1

columns.name: LevToHit
columns.description: Additional bonus Attack Rating when using this skill, calculated per skill level

columns.name: ToHitCalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Calculates the bonus Attack Rating when using the skill. This will override the .ToHit and .LevToHit fields if it is not blank. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: ResultFlags
columns.description: Controls different flags that can affect how the target reacts after being hit by the skill attack. Uses an integer value to check against different bit fields by using the "&" operator. For example, if the value equals 5 (binary = 101) then that returns true for both the 4 (binary = 100) and 1 (binary = 1) bit field values.

columns.name: HitFlags
columns.description: Controls different flags that can affect the damage dealt when the target is hit by the skill. Uses an integer value to check against different bit fields by using the "&" operator. For example, if the value equals 6 (binary = 110) then that returns true for both the 4 (binary = 100) and 2 (binary = 10) bit field values.

columns.name: HitClass
columns.description: Defines the skill's damage routines when hitting, mainly used for determining hit sound effects and overlays. Uses an integer value to check against different bit fields by using the "&" operator. For example, if the value equals 6 (binary = 110) then that returns true for both the 4 (binary = 100) and 2 (binary = 10) bit field values. There are binary masks to check between Base Hit Classes and Hit Class Layers, which can distinguish bewteen overlays or sounds are displayed.

columns.name: Kick
columns.description: Boolean Field. If equals 1, then a separate function is used to calculate the physical damage dealt by the skill, ignoring the following damage fields. This function will factor in the player character's Strength and Dexterity attributes (or Monster's level) to determine the baseline damage dealt. If equals 0, then ignore this.

columns.name: HitShift
columns.description: Controls the percentage modifier for the skill's damage. This value cannot be less than 0 or greater than 8. This is calculated in 256ths. Used like so: "damage << .HitShift"

columns.name: SrcDam
columns.description: Controls the percentage modifier for how much weapon damage is transferred to the skill's damage (Out of 128). For example, if the value equals 64, then 50% (64/128) of the weapon's damage will be added to the skill's damage.

columns.name: MinDam
columns.description: Minimum baseline physical damage dealt by the skill

columns.name: MinLevDam1
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MinLevDam2
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MinLevDam3
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MinLevDam4
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MinLevDam5
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MaxDam
columns.description: Maximum baseline physical damage dealt by the skill

columns.name: MaxLevDam1
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MaxLevDam2
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MaxLevDam3
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MaxLevDam4
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: MaxLevDam5
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum physical damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: DmgSymPerCalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Determines the percentage increase to the physical damage dealt by the skill. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: EType
columns.description: Defines the type of elemental damage dealt by the skill. If this field is empty, then the related elemental fields below will not be used. Types with length use .ELen

columns.name: EMin
columns.description: Minimum baseline elemental damage dealt by the skill

columns.name: EMinLev1
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: EMinLev2
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: EMinLev3
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: EMinLev4
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: EMinLev5
columns.description: Controls the additional minimum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field number.

columns.name: EMax
columns.description: Maximum baseline elemental damage dealt by the skill

columns.name: EMaxLev1
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field.

columns.name: EMaxLev2
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field.

columns.name: EMaxLev3
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field.

columns.name: EMaxLev4
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field.

columns.name: EMaxLev5
columns.description: Controls the additional maximum elemental damage dealt by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 5 level thresholds of the skill's current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17-22, 23-28, 29 and beyond. These 5 level thresholds correlate to each field.

columns.name: EDmgSymPerCalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Determines the percentage increase to the total elemental damage dealt by the skill. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: ELen
columns.description: The baseline elemental duration dealt by the skill. This is calculated in frame lengths where 25 Frames = 1 second. These fields only apply to appropriate elemental types with a duration.

columns.name: ELevLen1
columns.description: Controls the additional elemental duration added by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 3 level thresholds of the skills current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17 and beyond. These 3 level thresholds correlate to each field number. These fields only apply to appropriate elemental types with a duration.

columns.name: ELevLen2
columns.description: Controls the additional elemental duration added by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 3 level thresholds of the skills current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17 and beyond. These 3 level thresholds correlate to each field number. These fields only apply to appropriate elemental types with a duration.

columns.name: ELevLen3
columns.description: Controls the additional elemental duration added by the skill, calculated using the leveling formula between 3 level thresholds of the skills current level. The level thresholds are levels 2-8, 9-16, 17 and beyond. These 3 level thresholds correlate to each field number. These fields only apply to appropriate elemental types with a duration.

columns.name: ELenSymPerCalc
columns.description: Calculation Field. Determines the percentage increase to the total elemental duration dealt by the skill. Skill scope BBE. See BBE/Calc Fields

columns.name: aitype
columns.description: Controls what the skill's archetype for how the AI will handle using this skill. This mostly affects the mercenary AI, Shadow Warrior AI, and generic pet ai, but some types are used for general AI.

columns.name: aibonus
columns.description: This is only used with the Shadow Master AI and generic pet ai. This value is a flat integer rating that gets added to the AI's parameters when deciding which skill is most likely to be used next. The higher this value, then the more likely this skill will be used by the AI.

columns.name: cost mult
columns.description: Multiplicative modifier of an item's gold cost, only when the item has a stat modifier with this skill. This will affect the item's buy, sell, and repair costs (Calculated in 1024ths).

columns.name: cost add
columns.description: Flat integer modification of an item's gold cost, only when the item has a stat modifier with this skill. This will affect the item's buy, sell, and repair costs. This is added after the .cost mult has modified the costs.
